reason: Task has been fully refined with 9 concrete acceptance criteria, specific file paths, architectural constraints, and edge cases. All work was completed in the previous session and persisted to AO state via ao.task.update and ao.task.checklist-add. The scope is well-bounded and unambiguous for an implementation agent.

evidence.description: Task description updated with two-layer architecture context, 9 numbered AC, key file paths (root_types.rs, execute_types.rs, vision_types.rs, requirements_types.rs, ops_planning_facade.rs), and the critical constraint that ao vision/requirements draft/refine must remain callable as YAML workflow phase implementations

Confirmed all 5 builtin planning workflow YAMLs exist and are registered; ops_planning_facade.rs correctly routes ao planning commands to builtin/ refs; ao execute and ao task-control are the only pre-launch deprecated paths safe for full deletion
9 checklist items added to TASK-379, one per AC, enabling implementation agent to track incremental progress
